root_text.sn48.56:1.1: “Ekadhamme patiṭṭhitassa, bhikkhave, bhikkhuno pañcindriyāni bhāvitāni honti subhāvitāni.
root_text.sn48.56:1.5: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu cittaṁ rakkhati āsavesu ca sāsavesu ca dhammesu.
root_text.sn48.56:1.6: Tassa cittaṁ rakkhato āsavesu ca sāsavesu ca dhammesu saddhindriyampi bhāvanāpāripūriṁ gacchati.
root_text.sn48.56:1.11: Evampi kho, bhikkhave, ekadhamme patiṭṭhitassa bhikkhuno pañcindriyāni bhāvitāni honti subhāvitānī”ti.

translation_text.sn48.56:1.1: “Mendicants, when a mendicant is grounded in one thing the five faculties become developed, well developed.
translation_text.sn48.56:1.5: It’s when a mendicant looks after their mind when it comes to defilements and things that stimulate defilements.
translation_text.sn48.56:1.6: As they do so the faculties of faith,
translation_text.sn48.56:1.11: That’s how when a mendicant is grounded in one thing the five faculties become developed, well developed.”
